planned_actions: Search and collect papers on efficient attention mechanisms from 2024-2026
Create structured comparison table across latency, memory, and accuracy
Write trade-off analysis for each attention variant
Rank top 3 candidates with selection rationale
edge_cases: Papers with conflicting benchmark results across different hardware
Attention variants that only work for specific sequence lengths

known_risks: Some benchmark numbers are not directly comparable across papers due to different hardware setups
unverified_cases: Whether linear attention accuracy holds for sequences longer than 8K tokens in our specific use case
self_check.summary: Surveyed 18 papers, comparison table complete. Recommendations are well-supported but hardware-specific benchmarks may not transfer directly.

verdict.rationale: Survey exceeds minimum paper count, comparison table is thorough, and recommendations are well-reasoned with clear rationale.

closure.change_summary: Produced attention mechanism literature survey with 18-paper comparison table and ranked recommendations

reviews.summary: Methodology sound, recommendations align with project constraints
Paper selection covers major venues, analysis is balanced

debt_items: Follow-up benchmarking needed once model architecture is selected

what_went_well: Structured comparison format made trade-offs immediately visible
Including hardware context prevented misleading benchmark comparisons
next_time_guidance: Start with conference proceedings index to avoid missing recent papers
